committeeDescription: The Bitshares committee maintains a list of accounts that are blocked across the network. These accounts are not displayed here, but the count above reflects how many accounts are currently blocked by the committee. Add accounts below to maintain your own personal blocklist.
addUserDialogDescription: Search for a Bitshares account to add to your personal blocklist.
usersEmptyDescription: Add accounts you want to keep off your transactions list to track them here.
